# camtrapReport

An R package to explore and process camera trap data and automate
generating reports for Wildlife Monitoring.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`camData()`](https://spatialecology.github.io/camtrapReport/reference/camDataRd.md)
  : Create camera trap data object

- [`reportSection()`](https://spatialecology.github.io/camtrapReport/reference/reportSection.md)
  : Creates a reproducible subsection of the report.

- [`testSection()`](https://spatialecology.github.io/camtrapReport/reference/testSection.md)
  :

  Test a sub-section object (`.textSection` class)
